response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level/junior-mid position. Strong technical fit on TypeScript, React, Node.js, and relational databases, but severe seniority mismatch makes this a poor pairing — likely overqualified, expensive, and a retention risk. Berlin location aligns with the on-site requirement. PostgreSQL specifically is not listed (MongoDB/MySQL/SQL are), and Nest.js is not mentioned.
strengths: Strong TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience across multiple Berlin roles
Berlin-based, fits the on-site work environment requirement
Fullstack breadth from database to UI, plus DevOps/Docker/Kubernetes exposure
concerns: Severe seniority mismatch — Staff/Senior engineer applying for junior/mid role
No explicit PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience listed
High likelihood of compensation mismatch and short tenure for an entry-level posting
